# Security Context

- Auth pattern: [FILL IN — e.g., JWT with refresh token rotation, or session-based]
- Token storage: [FILL IN — e.g., httpOnly cookies]
- Password hashing: [FILL IN — e.g., bcrypt]
- Rate limiting: [FILL IN — e.g., applied to login-sensitive routes]
- Security-sensitive work includes: cookies, JWT, CORS, validation, secrets, permission checks
- Security review required before closing auth or trust-boundary changes
